title: Opkxxsvz4942Ihmm856Nho7Nv2Uqn3
summary:
Main
At 954.6m tonnes, 1H 2024 global crude steel output was just 0.1m tonnes short of the year-ago total-but yearly growth was focused in the Q1, as the Q2 was down -1.0%, worldsteel data show. There were also some massive differences in performance by geography. With dry bulk import demand in mind, we have charted three separate growth trends in crude steel output outside of China: (1) Northeast Asia, (2) India and Vietnam and (3) the EU and Turkey.
